caption: The moment Daniel Chen first saw Rebecca Morrison — everything we planned dissolves and what's left is real. Bellevue Grand Ballroom. #campbellevents [Dec 20]
Behind the scenes at Riverside Estate: tables set, candles lit, four hours to guests. This is the quiet part I love. [Dec 20]
Florals by Byrne & Bloom for the James & Grace wedding. Tessa outdid herself again. #philadelphiawedding [Dec 21]
Marco's team plating the three-course at Downtown Loft (Old City). When the kitchen runs on time, everyone dances longer. [Dec 21]
Golden hour at Bellevue Grand Ballroom. Fourteen years in and this light still stops me. [Dec 21]
Day-of timeline, printed and in the van. The details are the whole job. #weddingplanner [Dec 22]
A full room at Bryn Mawr Country Club for James & Grace. Congratulations, you two. [Dec 22]
Sunday reset before wedding week: biscuits, coffee, and a very unhelpful golden retriever. [Dec 23]
Ceremony arch going up at Bellevue Grand Ballroom. Weather held. It always feels like a small miracle. [Dec 23]
Greater Philadelphia Event Planners Association showcase tonight — good to see the whole vendor family in one room. [Dec 23]
Seating chart finalized for James & Grace. 180 guests, one puzzle, solved. #eventplanning [Dec 24]
Chestnut Hill morning walk with Benny before the Saturday grind begins. [Dec 24]
Tent's up at Bellevue Grand Ballroom for the outdoor ceremony. Rain plan ready, hoping we don't need it. [Dec 24]
Congratulations to Anthony DiStefano & Hannah Grant — an honor to plan your day at Riverside Estate. #campbellevents [Dec 25]
String trio sound check at Bryn Mawr Country Club. That first note during the processional gets me every time. [Dec 25]
Load-in at first light. Old City loft, 6am dock window, coffee number two already gone. [Dec 26]

Chen-Morrison reception in full swing at Bellevue Grand. Congratulations, you two.
Golden hour on the Riverside Estate lawn. Fourteen years in and this light still stops me.
Florals by Byrne & Bloom — garden roses and soft eucalyptus for the DiStefano-Grant wedding.
Marco's three-course tasting menu, plated and perfect at the Old City loft.
Ceremony arch at Bryn Mawr Country Club. Weather held. Small miracle.
Day-of timeline, printed and in the van. #weddingplanner
Behind the scenes: 200 place cards hand-checked before doors.
Sunday reset — biscuits, coffee, and a very unhelpful golden retriever.
String trio sound check at the Holloway-Park estate.
Load-in at first light. Loft dock window is 6 to 7:30 only.
Congratulations to Anthony & Hannah — an honor to plan your day.
Tablescape for the Kaplan-Rivera family-style dinner. Warm, low, intentional.
Lighting plan dialed in — warm wash on the head table.
The couple's first look. This is the part I do it for.
Seating chart finalized: 180 guests, one puzzle, solved.
GPEPA year-end showcase at The Logan Hotel. The whole vendor family in one room.
Rain plan ready for the outdoor ceremony — watching the 10-day forecast.
Cake by Sweet Laurel, florals by Byrne & Bloom, catering by Pellegrini. Dream team.
Chestnut Hill morning walk with Benny before the Saturday grind.
Last toast of the season. On to 2027.
